description: Breakpoint 2022 concludes with discussions on Helium's migration to Solana, workshops on SPL governance, and a live podcast recording on Qualcomm's history. The event features insights from Ledger and Stripe, and explores Web3's role in human rights.
topic_summary: Day 3 of Breakpoint 2022 includes technical discussions on Helium's transition to Solana [t=35:20], workshops on SPL governance [t=60:93], and a live podcast recording on Qualcomm [t=111:82]. The day wraps up with a closing celebration [t=203:74].
